title: chrysanthemum chrysostachys
intro: Chrysanthemum chrysostachys, also known as the yellow-flowering chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum chrysostachys include its ability to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant often take the form of tea, infusions, and dried flowers, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
